abilities.description: When you make a move to identify, detect, or interact with an anomalous force or mystic being, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. If by the time of the first encounter you score a strong hit, mark 1 tick on your discoveries legacy track.

'When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} as a direct result of interacting with an anomalous force or mystic being, add +1. On a strong hit, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.bd6278f18bbd6739]{Ask the Oracle} using the yes/no table about the force or being and take +2 momentum if the answer is helpful.

When you make a move by studying or focusing on someone or something in a charged situation, you may [after rolling] pierce the veil of perception. If you do, reroll any dice, but count a weak hit as a miss.
